hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; if [[ "$f" == *.php ]]; then vendor/bin/pint "$f" --format agent; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true

files=$({ git diff --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR HEAD -- '*.php' 2>/dev/null; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard -- '*.php' 2>/dev/null; } | sort -u) && if [ -n "$files" ]; then echo "$files" | xargs vendor/bin/phpstan analyse --no-progress --error-format=raw; fi
